location.user_base.name: Human Expedition Base
location.user_base.description: A fortified expeditionary outpost established by the Exo-Coalition.
location.empty_sector.name: Empty Sector
location.empty_sector.description: A desolate volcanic wasteland with no detectable resources or inhabitants.
location.resource.default.name: Resource Field
location.resource.iron.name: Iron Rich Location
location.resource.iron.description: Large-scale metallic formations indicate high concentrations of raw iron ore.
location.resource.titanium.name: Titanium Rich Location
location.resource.titanium.description: Volcanic vents surrounding jagged orange crystal clusters, a sign of rich titanium deposits.
location.resource.antimatter.name: Antimatter Rich Location
location.resource.antimatter.description: An unstable rift leaking pure antimatter, causing localized gravitational distortions.
location.resource.credits.name: Credit Rich Location
location.resource.credits.description: A ramshackle outpost built over the ruins of an old merchant hub, likely containing hoarded credits.
location.dangerous.default.name: Hazard Zone
location.dangerous.vault.name: Dangerous Vault
location.dangerous.vault.description: A monolithic precursor structure guarding the entrance to a long-forgotten vault.
location.dangerous.caverns.name: Dangerous Caverns
location.dangerous.caverns.description: Subterranean depths filled with bioluminescent neural filaments and ancient data archives.
location.dangerous.spires.name: Dangerous Spires
location.dangerous.spires.description: A forest of floating obsidian spires that hum with a rhythmic, defensive energy.
location.dangerous.monolith.name: Dangerous Monolith
location.dangerous.monolith.description: A massive, featureless black monolith that seems to absorb all light and nearby scans.
